title: Senior Data Engineer
description_text: OVERVIEW OF 73 STRINGS: 73 Strings is an innovative platform providing comprehensive data extraction, monitoring, and valuation solutions for the private capital industry. The company's AI-powered platform streamlines middle-office processes for alternative investments, enabling seamless data structuring and standardization, monitoring, and fair value estimation at the click of a button. 73 Strings serves clients globally across various strategies, including Private Equity, Growth Equity, Venture Capital, Infrastructure and Private Credit. Our 2025 $55M Series B, the largest in the industry, was led by Goldman Sachs, with participation from Golub Capital and Hamilton Lane, with continued support from Blackstone, Fidelity International Strategic Ventures and Broadhaven Ventures. About the Role: We are looking for a Senior Data Engineer to build and own the data pipelines, integrations, and warehousing infrastructure that power 73 Strings' valuation and monitoring platform. This is a hands-on engineering role — you will design, develop, and maintain scalable data solutions that ingest financial data from multiple sources, transform it for downstream analytics, and keep it reliable in production. You will work directly with product, engineering, and client-facing teams to translate complex financial data requirements into well-engineered, observable pipelines. The role demands deep technical execution, not just architectural direction. What You’ll Do Data Engineering & Pipeline Development Design, develop, and maintain end-to-end ETL/ELT pipelines that ingest financial and valuation data from relational databases, APIs, and Elasticsearch. Implement Change Data Capture (CDC) and incremental loading strategies to keep data fresh without full reloads. Build scalable ingestion frameworks for dynamic and evolving schemas, including semi-structured JSON payloads. Troubleshoot and resolve complex data integration issues in production through structured root cause analysis. Develop and maintain data transformation logic using dbt and Apache Airflow for orchestration. Cloud Data Warehousing Build and maintain dimensional models, fact tables, and reporting data marts on cloud data warehouse platforms. Optimize warehouse performance through query tuning, partitioning strategies, and storage cost management. Develop and manage data pipelines using cloud-native warehousing features for ingestion, transformation, and change tracking. Maintain transformation logic supporting analytical reporting and downstream BI consumption. API & Integration Development Build and maintain integrations from REST APIs, SaaS platforms, and internal applications into the data platform. Design reusable ingestion patterns that handle authentication, pagination, rate limiting, and schema drift. Collaborate with product and engineering teams to define integration contracts and data schemas. Work with JSON and other semi-structured formats; ensure clean parsing and lineage back to source. Data Quality & Governance Implement validation frameworks, reconciliation checks, and data quality rules across pipelines. Set up monitoring, alerting, and auditing so data issues surface before they reach end users. Ensure data accuracy, completeness, and consistency across systems and reporting layers. Participate in data governance practices: lineage tracking, documentation, and access controls. Stakeholder Collaboration Work directly with business users, valuation teams, product managers, and client stakeholders to gather requirements. Translate business and regulatory data requirements into clear, implementable technical designs. Support production deployments, incident resolution, and ongoing pipeline enhancements. Communicate clearly with both technical teammates and non-technical stakeholders on data issues and delivery timelines. Requirements : Experience 5+ years in data engineering, ETL development, or data integration — with production systems, not just prototypes. Proven track record delivering enterprise data pipelines in cloud environments. Experience with Snowflake or Databricks as a primary data platform: dimensional modeling, performance tuning, and cost management. Hands-on Informatica IICS development: mappings, tasks, REST API connectors, and error handling. Experience integrating data from REST APIs, relational databases (PostgreSQL, SQL Server, MySQL), and semi-structured sources. Practical knowledge of dbt for transformation logic and Apache Airflow for orchestration. Technical Skills ETL/ELT design: CDC patterns, incremental loads, full reloads, and SCD handling. Python or Scala for data processing, scripting, and pipeline automation. REST API consumption: authentication (OAuth, API keys), pagination, rate limiting, and schema mapping. JSON and semi-structured data parsing; experience handling evolving or inconsistent schemas. Streaming and real-time data: working knowledge of Kafka or Spark Streaming (production experience a plus). Cloud data platform experience: AWS (Glue, S3, Lambda), Azure (Data Factory, ADLS), or GCP (Dataflow, BigQuery). Data quality tooling: validation frameworks, reconciliation checks, pipeline observability, and alerting. SQL proficiency: complex joins, window functions, CTEs, and query optimization.

title: Directeur(trice) de la restauration (H/F)
description_text: Le Château de Fonscolombe, niché au cœur de la Provence, est un hôtel 5* Relais & Châteaux de 50 chambres doté de deux restaurants dont un classé une étoile au guide Michelin, ainsi qu'une belle activité séminaires et banquets. On y retrouve la convivialité attachante d’une demeure familiale et l’art de vivre à la française emblématique des Maisons 2L Collection. Nous rejoindre, c'est : 1) Avoir l'opportunité de travailler dans un cadre idyllique. 2) Apporter votre expertise et participer à des projets de développement ambitieux. 3) Rejoindre un groupe à taille humaine, où les valeurs principales sont l'esprit de famille et le vivre en conscience. Poste à pourvoir en CDI dès à présent, mais nous sommes prêts à attendre le bon candidat qui saura s'inscrire sur la durée. Missions principales Rattaché(e) à la Direction de l'hôtel, vous êtes responsable de la performance globale du département restauration. À ce titre, vos missions sont notamment : Définir et mettre en œuvre la stratégie restauration de l’établissement Superviser l’ensemble des points de vente (restaurant(s), bar(s), room service, banquets, etc.) Manager, recruter, former et motiver les équipes (salle, cuisine en collaboration avec le Chef) Garantir la qualité de service, l’expérience client et le respect des standards Piloter les budgets, optimiser les coûts et assurer la rentabilité Mettre en place et suivre les indicateurs de performance (CA, ratios, marges) Veiller au respect des normes d’hygiène, de sécurité et de réglementation Être force de proposition sur l’offre, les cartes, les concepts et les événements Qualités requises Formation supérieure en hôtellerie restauration ou management Expérience significative et stable sur un poste similaire indispensable Excellentes compétences managériales et organisationnelles Sens aigu du service client et de la qualité Capacité d’analyse financière et de pilotage de la performance Leadership, rigueur, autonomie et esprit d’initiative Maîtrise des outils informatiques et de gestion La maîtrise de l’anglais Spécificités du poste Poste à temps complet Travail le week-end et les jours fériés. Gère son temps et son activité en fonction des contraintes liées à la profession (horaires, activités, clientèle). Avantages : Temps complet CDI Restaurant du personnel Prise en charge à hauteur de 50 euros de l'achat d'une paire de chaussures Mutuelle d'entreprise Bénéfices membre Relais Châteaux : des réductions sur tous les hôtels jusqu'à 50% du tarif Bénéfices membre 2L Collection : 100€/nuit pour vous et 180€/nuit pour votre famille et vos amis Des perspectives d'emploi & de carrière !

title: Chef de rang H/F
description_text: Intégrez l'équipe des Lumières, hôtel5* Relais&Châteaux, situé face au Château de Versailles. L’hôtel Les Lumières est construit dans un bâtiment inscrit aux monuments historiques dont la façade classée donne directement sur la Place d’Arme devant la Cour Royale du Château de Versailles. Classé 5 étoiles, il offrira 31 chambres et suites, 3 espaces de restauration (dont La Galerie des Lumières, La Table des Lumières et une grande esplanade devant l’hôtel donnant directement sur le château), une boutique signée Pierre Hermé, et un espace bien-être Nos valeurs : Authenticité - Esprit de famille - Vivre en conscience Nous rejoindre c'est : - profiter de sa vie en dehors du travail avec des horaires en continu et des repos toujours consécutifs. - déjeuner ou diner à la cafétéria du personnel - revêtir un uniforme fourni et entretenu par l'hôtel (chaussures inclus) - réaliser avec toute l'équipe de l'hôtel un service de qualité et bénéficier d'une prime e-reputation de 100€ brute par mois. - découvrir l'ensemble des maisons 2L Collection et Relais&Châteaux avec des tarifs préférentiels - bénéficier d'un remboursement à 100% de son Pass Navigo ou de son abonnement parking - être formé(e) en interne au sein de la 2L Académie et évoluer grâce au plan de développement des compétences 2LCollection. Nouveau challenge ! Rejoignez l'équipe des Lumières en CDI dès maintenant et bénéficiez d'horaires en continu Au sein de l’équipe de salle, vous contribuez à la préparation et au bon déroulement du service. Vous appréciez travailler en équipe pour transformer le moment du repas en un souvenir inoubliable pour le client. Vous êtes acteur du bien être des clients, de la qualité de service et de leur niveau de satisfaction. Vous serez amené(e) à travailler pour les différents points de restauration de l’hôtel. Vous êtes au fait des questions écologiques ; conscient(e) de l’importance de consommer de manière responsable et engagé(e) dans la réduction du gaspillage alimentaire. Votre œil de lynx, votre  capacité à vous exprimer en anglais, votre courtoisie, votre capacité d’organisation ainsi que votre sens du détail seront les clés de votre réussite parmi nous.

title: Gouvernant(e) d'étages - CDI

Une décoration Art Déco offrant à chaque pièce une élégance moderne et contemporaine. Dans un cadre artistique, une ambiance chaleureuse et intimiste : Nous recherchons un(e) Gouvernant(e) H/F en CDI pour rejoindre notre équipe dès que possible. Notre Gouvernante générale veillera à votre bonne intégration et se fera un plaisir de vous former aux standards de la Maison, dans le respect des valeurs du groupe 2LCollection : esprit de famille, vivre en conscience et authenticité ! Sous la Responsabilité de la Gouvernante Générale, vos missions principales : • Mise en place et suivi opérationnel des tâches de nettoyage de fonds confiées aux équipiers • Management de l’équipe femmes de chambre et contrôle des chambres effectuées avec application de la procédure « marche en avant » • Application des règles d’hygiène et de sécurité et rôle de formation continue des équipes • Répartition du travail pour les équipiers et femmes de chambres lors des ouvertures/fermetures du service d’étages • Supervision du service couverture • Satisfaction Clients en personnalisant le service et en contribuant à la réalisation des objectifs fixés par la gouvernante générale. • Suivi de l’état général du mobilier et des ameublements en collaboration avec la gouvernante générale • Réalisation d’inventaires en chambres afin de signaler les dysfonctionnements techniques et/ou de signaler les actions à mettre en place pour assurer une qualité optimale • Contrôle de la propreté des lieux publics, des bureaux et des vestiaires du personnel • Gestion des réserves et suivi des stocks • Gestion des objets trouvés • Contrôle qualité du linge • Suivi des procédures linge clients, gestion des uniformes et des ameublements Cette liste n’est pas exhaustive. PROFIL RECHERCHE Connaissances et Compétences • Vous avez une excellente présentation, et le sens de l’accueil • Très bon niveau d’anglais professionnel ; une seconde langue est appréciée • Vous êtes organisé(e), discret, avez l’esprit d’équipe et le souci du détail • Vous avez l’habitude de travailler dans le respect des normes d’hygiène et de sécurité. • Vous êtes à l’aise avec l’informatique (Pack office) + PMS AVANTAGES 2 jours de repos consécutifs Bénéfices membre 2L Collection pour votre famille et vos amis Prime de cooptation de 600€ brut à chaque coopté validé Mutuelle prise en charge à 50% Remboursement à hauteur de 100% de l'abonnement Navigo Nous rejoindre, c’est : 1. Avoir l’opportunité de travailler dans un cadre d’exception. 2. Apporter votre expertise en venant compléter une équipe dynamique et investie ! 3. Rejoindre 2LCollection, un groupe à taille humaine où les valeurs principales sont l’esprit de famille, le vivre en conscience et l’authenticité. Il ne manque plus que vous ! Nous attendons votre candidature avec impatience. SPECIFICITES Salaire : 30 000 € annuel brut

title: Solutions Architect
description_text: OVERVIEW OF 73 STRINGS: 73 Strings is an innovative platform providing comprehensive data extraction, monitoring, and valuation solutions for the private capital industry. The company's AI-powered platform streamlines middle-office processes for alternative investments, enabling seamless data structuring and standardization, monitoring, and fair value estimation at the click of a button. 73 Strings serves clients globally across various strategies, including Private Equity, Growth Equity, Venture Capital, Infrastructure and Private Credit. Our 2025 $55M Series B, the largest in the industry, was led by Goldman Sachs, with participation from Golub Capital and Hamilton Lane, with continued support from Blackstone, Fidelity International Strategic Ventures and Broadhaven Ventures. Solutions Architect  Overview:  We are looking for a highly consultative and experienced Solutions Architect (SA) who has operated in complex SaaS environments.  As a part of the Solutions Engineering team, you will play an integral role in several phases of the client lifecycle. SA’s support all pre-sales productivity and deal flow by securing the “technical close” for our complex solutions and will ensure clients are setup for success as they transition to our Implementation and Customer Success teams. SA’s collaborate closely with our Sales, SME, Implementation, Customer Success and Product teams to ensure proposed deals include technical solutions that accurately address client needs and are properly supported by key client decision-makers.  This is a role that requires heavy interaction with prospects and clients and is ideal for someone with a passion for technology, problem-solving, and the ability to communicate complex technical concepts to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.  The ideal candidate demonstrates proficiency in leveraging AI tools to automate workflows and optimize daily output. We value individuals who proactively integrate emerging technologies to enhance efficiency and deliver high quality results. Role & Responsibilities  Collaborate with sales teams to understand prospect’s business needs and technical requirements.  Articulate the value of the technology and product positioning to both business and technical users.  Deliver tailored product demos that highlight the technical features and capabilities of our SaaS platform and create compelling use cases that address the prospect's unique needs.  Design and maintain demo environments showcasing 73 Strings’ features and functionalities.  Serve as a technical advisor during sales calls, meetings, and follow-ups.  Lead POC engagements by setting up environments, configuring solutions to align with customer use cases, and ensuring a successful experience.  Lead a consultative technical selling process and build robust long-term relationships with prospects and clients  Drive grow of the 73 Strings Brand with ones Industry, Platform and Private Markets Knowledge  Assist the sales team in crafting responses to technical inquiries in RFPs and RFIs.  Work closely with the Implementations and Customer Success team to ensure smooth onboarding of new customers, providing all relevant technical information and context.  Train and mentor junior colleagues  Qualifications & Requirements  Graduate or post-graduate qualification  5+ years of customer facing experience in a client facing role such as Solutions Architect, Sales Engineer, Pre-Sales Engineer Project Management, or Solutions role.  Experience in delivering engaging and technical sales demos  Good understanding of Private Markets’ ecosystem (Private Equity, Private Credit, Venture Capital) and workflow (portfolio monitoring, valuations)  Coaching and training capabilities  Exceptional presentation, communication and client skills  Technology/platform ultra - savvy  Outstanding project management skills and methodology  Critical thinking and time management skills required.  Passion for technology and a love for working in a fast-paced high growth environment  Fluency in Microsoft Office suite (Outlook, Excel, Word, PowerPoint, etc.)

title: Senior Data Architect
description_text: OVERVIEW OF 73 STRINGS: 73 Strings is an innovative platform providing comprehensive data extraction, monitoring, and valuation solutions for the private capital industry. The company's AI-powered platform streamlines middle-office processes for alternative investments, enabling seamless data structuring and standardization, monitoring, and fair value estimation at the click of a button. 73 Strings serves clients globally across various strategies, including Private Equity, Growth Equity, Venture Capital, Infrastructure and Private Credit. Our 2025 $55M Series B, the largest in the industry, was led by Goldman Sachs, with participation from Golub Capital and Hamilton Lane, with continued support from Blackstone, Fidelity International Strategic Ventures and Broadhaven Ventures. About the Role: We are seeking a Senior Data Architect to serve as a technical lead shaping the future of our data platform in the financial services space. This is a high-impact, hands-on leadership role — you will own architectural direction, drive integration strategy, and act as a trusted technical advisor to both internal stakeholders and external clients. What You’ll Do Data Platform Leadership Define and evolve the enterprise data architecture strategy, ensuring scalability, reliability, and governance across the platform. Lead the design and implementation of cloud data warehousing and lakehouse solutions, with a focus on Snowflake and Databricks, aligned with financial services data requirements. Establish data modeling standards, data quality frameworks, and best practices across engineering teams. Champion data governance, security, and compliance practices in alignment with financial industry regulations (e.g., SOC 2, GDPR, CCPA). Integrations & API Development Partner with Product Management and business stakeholders to design and deliver robust data integrations and APIs (REST, GraphQL, ETL/ELT pipelines). Architect scalable, reusable integration patterns that connect internal systems, third-party platforms, and client data ecosystems. Define API contracts, data schemas, and integration standards that support both internal development teams and external partners. Translate complex business and regulatory requirements into sound, implementable technical designs. Implementation Support Serve as a technical expert and Engineering partner to pre-sales and implementation teams providing architectural guidance where needed to ensure successful client on boarding Engage with critical prospects and clients as needed, helping build trusted relationships with their senior technical stakeholders. Requirements : 8+ years of experience in data architecture or data engineering. Proven expertise in cloud data platforms such as Snowflake, Databricks, including data modeling, performance tuning, and cost optimization. Hands-on experience designing and building REST APIs and ETL/ELT pipelines at scale. Strong proficiency with real-time and streaming data platforms such as Kafka, Flink, and Spark. Hands-on experience with modern data orchestration and transformation tools such as dbt and Apache Airflow. Experience with data testing frameworks, pipeline observability, and monitoring practices that ensure data quality, reliability, and operational visibility in production environments. Experience with major cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP), including cloud-native data services, networking, and security. Proven experience with vector database or embedding infrastructure in production. Experience integrating unstructured data (documents, PDFs, presentations) into a structured data platform, including extraction, normalisation, and lineage back to source artefacts. Demonstrated ability to drive technical strategy and lead cross-functional projects. Working understanding of LLM and RAG architectures, including tenant-aware retrieval, context isolation, and the data quality and lineage prerequisites for safe deployment. Strong communication skills with the ability to translate complex technical concepts for executive and non-technical audiences.

title: Process Engineer Junior
description_text: About the role The Junior Process Engineer supports optimization, stability, and continuous improvement of production processes. The role focuses on analyzing process performance, supporting problem-solving activities, and assisting in the implementation of improvement initiatives to enhance efficiency, quality, and operational performance. Your responsibilities: · support the analysis and monitoring of manufacturing processes, · collect and evaluate process data and assist in identifying improvement opportunities. · participate in troubleshooting activities and root cause analysis of production issues, · support the implementation of continuous improvement initiatives (Lean / CI), · contribute to maintaining and updating process documentation, work instructions, and standards. Requirements: Education: Bachelor’s degree in engineering (e.g., mechanical, industrial, chemical, or process engineering) Experience: Minimum 1 year of experience, ideally in a manufacturing environment Languages: Fluent in English (B1 level or higher), local language Systems/tools: strong MS Office skills (Excel, Outlook, Word, PowerPoint), Licenses & certifications: Driving license Competences and skills: · Strong analytical thinking mindset and problem-solving ability · Strong communication skills · Proactive, organized, and able to work under pressure · Familiarity with Lean or continuous improvement tools · Comfortable working in a dynamic, cross-functional environment What we offer: · Full 13th-month salary (basic salary from 1.500€, upon agreement and experience) · Meal allowance · English language courses to boost your skills and career growth · Employer contributions to your private pension plan (3rd pillar) securing your future · Exclusive employee events and fun, Fruit Days to keep the energy up · Multisport card for access to a wide range of sports and wellness activities Information about the selection process Please, send your CV in Slovak and English language. We will contact only suitable candidates for this position. Thank you for understanding. Brief description of the company https://aafeurope.com/sk/ https://www.linkedin.com/showcase/aaf-slovakia AAF International, the world’s largest manufacturer of air filtration solutions, operates production, warehousing and distribution facilities in 22 countries across four continents. With its global headquarters in Louisville, Kentucky and its European headquarters in Heppenheim, Germany, AAF International is committed to protecting people, processes and systems through the development and manufacturing of the highest quality air filters, filtration equipment and containment housings available today. We offer comprehensive, innovative air filtration solutions designed to remove and control airborne particulates and gaseous contaminants in residential, commercial, industrial, cleanroom, transportation, and nuclear power applications. AAF International is supported in our international ventures through the resources of our parent company, Daikin Industries Ltd., based in Osaka, Japan, a diversified international manufacturing company and a global leader in air conditioning.

title: Elektriker till 1KOMMA5° i Stockholm
description_text: Vi driver visionen om en klimatneutral villamarknad och erbjuder solceller, laddboxar, energilagring och vårt AI-styrsystem Heartbeat. Sedan starten 2021 har vi vuxit till 3000 medarbetare på 80 platser runt om i världen och blev unicorn 2023 som ett av världens snabbast växande cleantechbolag. Följ med på en imponerande resa genom att bli en del av 1KOMMA5° Sverige, och forma framtiden för kommande generationer – steg för steg, hus för hus. Om rollen Som elektriker blir du en viktig del av våra projekt, från planering till färdig installation. Du arbetar med installation, driftsättning och service av solcellsanläggningar, växelriktare, laddboxar och energilagringssystem hemma hos våra kunder. Du planerar själv dina arbetsdagar utifrån uppdrag som tilldelas av vår projektledare, och har löpande kundkontakt för att säkerställa en trygg och professionell upplevelse. Arbetet är varierat och innebär både självständigt ansvar och samarbete med kollegor i fält och på kontoret. title: QA Automation Engineer
description_text: OVERVIEW OF 73 STRINGS: 73 Strings is an innovative platform providing comprehensive data extraction, monitoring, and valuation solutions for the private capital industry. The company's AI-powered platform streamlines middle-office processes for alternative investments, enabling seamless data structuring and standardization, monitoring, and fair value estimation at the click of a button. 73 Strings serves clients globally across various strategies, including Private Equity, Growth Equity, Venture Capital, Infrastructure and Private Credit. Our 2025 $55M Series B, the largest in the industry, was led by Goldman Sachs, with participation from Golub Capital and Hamilton Lane, with continued support from Blackstone, Fidelity International Strategic Ventures and Broadhaven Ventures. The ideal candidate demonstrates proficiency in leveraging AI tools to automate workflows and optimize daily output. We value individuals who proactively integrate emerging technologies to enhance efficiency and deliver high quality results. About the Role: The QA team at 73 Strings delivers tailored-made test runners, frameworks and test suites for a rich complex webapp and desktop app. As part of this team, you will own end-to-end UI and API functional test suites, test bar, test coverage for an entire area of feature of our webapp. Your missions include creating test code in multiple languages (e.g. TypeScript, Java, C#), leveraging multiple test frameworks (e.g. Playwright, Selenium, REST Assured, JMeter) and contributing to define the test strategy for the feature area that you own (test bar, test coverage, API / UI trade off). We are looking for a highly skilled QA Automation Engineer with strong hands-on experience in test automation development. The candidate must have solid expertise in automated code programming and the ability to lead end-to-end testing activities across multiple environments. The ideal candidate also has sufficient technical and programming proficiency to customize or develop new features of the test framework itself (e.g. collect and analyze test results).lect and High collaboration skills are required in this fast-growing organization. Familiarity with financial domain projects is a plus. Requirement: 5+ years of experience in automation testing Strong experience in UI test design using Page Object Models, Playwright, Java or TypeScript or C# Strong experience in API test design using Postman, REST Assured or similar framework Experience with JMeter or other performance test tool Exposure to modern UI automation tools Strong understanding of  STLC Experience working in Agile Scrum or Kanban methodologies Working knowledge of Git version control, JIRA (Kanban boards, Scrum boards, Issue Management in an Agile work environment) Proficiency in using AI tools to deliver results Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills Nice to have : Ability to modify or develop custom features in an existing test framework Experience with CI/CD tools – Jenkins or Azure DevOps Experience with test reporting and dashboard tools Experience working on financial domain products

title: Endpoint Support Engineer
description_text: OVERVIEW OF 73 STRINGS: 73 Strings is an innovative platform providing comprehensive data extraction, monitoring, and valuation solutions for the private capital industry. The company's AI-powered platform streamlines middle-office processes for alternative investments, enabling seamless data structuring and standardization, monitoring, and fair value estimation at the click of a button. 73 Strings serves clients globally across various strategies, including Private Equity, Growth Equity, Venture Capital, Infrastructure and Private Credit. Our 2025 $55M Series B, the largest in the industry, was led by Goldman Sachs, with participation from Golub Capital and Hamilton Lane, with continued support from Blackstone, Fidelity International Strategic Ventures and Broadhaven Ventures. About the Role: WHAT YOU'LL OWN End-user support First point of contact for all IT issues — Jira, chat, email. Triage, resolve within SLA, escalate only when warranted. Windows and macOS. You document what you do. Device lifecycle Procurement to decommission. Laptop refresh across PC and Mac. Accurate inventory. Global hardware coordination with suppliers and Finance when needed. HR-integrated IT workflows Accounts, devices, and access ready before day one. Access revoked on the last day of employment — not the week after. Mid-cycle moves and reallocations too. Networking — Bangalore office Day-to-day wireless ops, vendor coordination, and escalation when it warrants it. Support for planned infrastructure upgrades: firewall, UPS, and access points. Endpoint security operations Integrate Defender policies, app controls, and compliance baselines into MDM — and make sure they hold. Triage alerts across anti-malware, EDR, and app whitelisting tools. Decide what gets escalated versus resolved at your level. SOC handoff Bridge between endpoint tooling and the SOC — investigation handoffs, analyst reviews, and keeping the feedback loop tight so detections don't fall between teams. Scripting, tooling, and documentation Maintain scripts for endpoint discovery, deployment, and reporting. Own the runbooks and standards. If a process only lives in someone's head, that's your gap to close. Threat awareness Build working expertise in anti-malware operation and indicators of compromise. Not a threat hunter — but sharp enough to catch what others miss. Key Responsibilities:  2 to 4 years in desktop support, IT helpdesk, or endpoint engineering Solid troubleshooting across Windows 11 and macOS Hands-on MDM experience — Hexnode, Intune, Jamf, or equivalent Working knowledge of Entra ID and user account management Jira Service Management or a comparable ticketing system Networking fundamentals: WiFi, TCP/IP, VPN, DHCP/DNS Strong Communications.

title: Senior Data Architect
description_text: OVERVIEW OF 73 STRINGS: 73 Strings is an innovative platform providing comprehensive data extraction, monitoring, and valuation solutions for the private capital industry. The company's AI-powered platform streamlines middle-office processes for alternative investments, enabling seamless data structuring and standardization, monitoring, and fair value estimation at the click of a button. 73 Strings serves clients globally across various strategies, including Private Equity, Growth Equity, Venture Capital, Infrastructure and Private Credit. Our 2025 $55M Series B, the largest in the industry, was led by Goldman Sachs, with participation from Golub Capital and Hamilton Lane, with continued support from Blackstone, Fidelity International Strategic Ventures and Broadhaven Ventures. About the Role: We are seeking a Senior Data Architect to serve as a technical lead shaping the future of our data platform in the financial services space. This is a high-impact, hands-on leadership role — you will own architectural direction, drive integration strategy, and act as a trusted technical advisor to both internal stakeholders and external clients. What You’ll Do Data Platform Leadership Define and evolve the enterprise data architecture strategy, ensuring scalability, reliability, and governance across the platform. Lead the design and implementation of cloud data warehousing and lakehouse solutions, with a focus on Snowflake and Databricks, aligned with financial services data requirements. Establish data modeling standards, data quality frameworks, and best practices across engineering teams. Champion data governance, security, and compliance practices in alignment with financial industry regulations (e.g., SOC 2, GDPR, CCPA). Integrations & API Development Partner with Product Management and business stakeholders to design and deliver robust data integrations and APIs (REST, GraphQL, ETL/ELT pipelines). Architect scalable, reusable integration patterns that connect internal systems, third-party platforms, and client data ecosystems. Define API contracts, data schemas, and integration standards that support both internal development teams and external partners. Translate complex business and regulatory requirements into sound, implementable technical designs. Implementation Support Serve as a technical expert and Engineering partner to pre-sales and implementation teams providing architectural guidance where needed to ensure successful client on boarding Engage with critical prospects and clients as needed, helping build trusted relationships with their senior technical stakeholders. Requirements : 8+ years of experience in data architecture or data engineering. Proven expertise in cloud data platforms such as Snowflake, Databricks, including data modeling, performance tuning, and cost optimization. Hands-on experience designing and building REST APIs and ETL/ELT pipelines at scale. Strong proficiency with real-time and streaming data platforms such as Kafka, Flink, and Spark. Hands-on experience with modern data orchestration and transformation tools such as dbt and Apache Airflow. Experience with data testing frameworks, pipeline observability, and monitoring practices that ensure data quality, reliability, and operational visibility in production environments. Experience with major cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP), including cloud-native data services, networking, and security. Proven experience with vector database or embedding infrastructure in production. Experience integrating unstructured data (documents, PDFs, presentations) into a structured data platform, including extraction, normalisation, and lineage back to source artefacts. Demonstrated ability to drive technical strategy and lead cross-functional projects. Working understanding of LLM and RAG architectures, including tenant-aware retrieval, context isolation, and the data quality and lineage prerequisites for safe deployment. Strong communication skills with the ability to translate complex technical concepts for executive and non-technical audiences.

description_text: We are recruiting an Associate Director to lead our Healthcare Estates category management offering as part of Clarity Consulting. The Clarity team works with clients to deliver sustainable, high-impact change across a challenging and fast-moving sector. The Role As Associate Director - Healthcare Estates you will lead projects across estates, facilities and capital-related spend for NHS trusts and other health providers. You will work with stakeholders to develop and embed sustainable solutions to the challenges they face. The role combines client delivery, team leadership and commercial growth responsibilities. Key Responsibilities Lead complex healthcare estates projects, programmes and strategic client engagements, ensuring high-quality delivery and value-based outcomes Work with clients to shape models of care, estate strategies and business cases aligned to service, workforce and organisational goals Provide leadership across delivery, governance, risk and quality assurance, coordinating multidisciplinary teams and specialist input Build strong client relationships and contribute to business growth through opportunity identification, proposal development and account expansion Lead, coach and develop colleagues and client teams, modelling Clarity’s values and supporting strong team performance About You To succeed in this role you should be able to demonstrate the following: Experience developing healthcare estate strategies aligned to service models, population need and long-term organisational goals Knowledge of healthcare estates policy, guidance and HM Treasury Green Book business case development Proven track record of leading complex change, projects and programmes within health and care settings Stakeholder management skills, with the ability to influence, advise and build credibility with senior clients Analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to develop practical, evidence-based solutions to complex estate challenges Experience leading teams, managing delivery and supporting the development of others What We Offer A collaborative, growing consultancy where you can make a visible impact on client outcomes. title: Operátor výroby
description_text: Náplň práce, právomoci a zodpovednosti montáž vzduchových filtrov obsluha výrobných strojov a zariadení dodržiavanie stanovených pracovných postupov a výrobných plánov vizuálna kontrola kvality hotových výrobkov balenie výrobkov podľa predpísaných štandardov práca s výrobnou a technickou dokumentáciou udržiavanie poriadku na pracovisku dodržiavanie zásad BOZP a interných predpisov spoločnosti Zamestnanecké výhody, benefity 1140 EUR/mesiac - hodinová základná mzda 5,45€ + 0,94€ výkonnostný bonus + 100€ dochádzkový bonus, 13. plat a iné odmeny stravné lístky hradené v plnej výške zamestnávateľom 13. plat vo výške 1 mesačnej mzdy (vyplatená v dvoch výplatách) poobedný príplatok nad rámec zákona práca v dvojzmennej, trojzmennej prevádzke práca v čistom a nehlučnom prostredí práca pondelok až piatok (príležitostne v sobotu) benefity - zam. spoločenské akcie, Multisport karta, ovocie každý týždeň, pitný režim, mikulášsky a vianočný darček, darček pri životných jubileách, dni zdravia, pranie fir. oblečenia možnosť kariérneho rastu (uprednostňujeme našich zamestnancov pri voľných pozíciách) Osobnostné predpoklady a zručnosti znalosť slovenského jazyka - podmienkou manuálna zručnosť a cit pre detail technické myslenie zodpovedný prístup k práci a dochádzke spoľahlivosť a samostatnosť ochota pracovať a učiť sa nové veci prax vo výrobe je výhodou, nie podmienkou skúsenosti / vzdelanie v elektro oblasti, prípadne §21 výhodou Informácie o výberovom konaní Uchádzačov prosíme zaslať aktuálny životopis v slovenskom jazyku. Kontaktovať budeme len vybraných uchádzačov. Stručná charakteristika spoločnosti https://www.linkedin.com/showcase/aaf-slovakia Závod AAF International na Slovensku je situovaný v Trenčíne. Závod sa zameriava na výrobu vysokokvalitných filtračných zariadení. AAF, najväčší svetový výrobca riešení filtrácie vzduchu, prevádzkuje výrobné, skladovacie a distribučné zariadenia v 22 krajinách na štyroch kontinentoch. S globálnou centrálou v Louisville v Kentucky a európskou centrálou v Heppenheime v Nemecku sa spoločnosť zaviazala chrániť ľudí, procesy a systémy prostredníctvom vývoja a výroby najkvalitnejších vzduchových filtrov a filtračných zariadení, ktoré sú v dnešnej dobe dostupné. Ponúkame komplexné a inovatívne riešenie filtrácie vzduchu určené na odstraňovanie a kontrolu tuhých a plynných znečisťujúcich látok v obydliach, obchodných centrách, priemyselných priestoroch a dopravných prostriedkoch. Spoločnosť AAF International je podporovaná v našich medzinárodných obchodoch prostredníctvom zdrojov našej materskej spoločnosti Daikin Industries Ltd. so sídlom v japonskej Osake, medzinárodnej výrobnej spoločnosti a globálneho lídra v oblasti klimatizácie.

title: Senior Data Engineer
description_text: OVERVIEW OF 73 STRINGS: 73 Strings is an innovative platform providing comprehensive data extraction, monitoring, and valuation solutions for the private capital industry. The company's AI-powered platform streamlines middle-office processes for alternative investments, enabling seamless data structuring and standardization, monitoring, and fair value estimation at the click of a button. 73 Strings serves clients globally across various strategies, including Private Equity, Growth Equity, Venture Capital, Infrastructure and Private Credit. Our 2025 $55M Series B, the largest in the industry, was led by Goldman Sachs, with participation from Golub Capital and Hamilton Lane, with continued support from Blackstone, Fidelity International Strategic Ventures and Broadhaven Ventures. About the Role: We are looking for a Senior Data Engineer to build and own the data pipelines, integrations, and warehousing infrastructure that power 73 Strings' valuation and monitoring platform. This is a hands-on engineering role — you will design, develop, and maintain scalable data solutions that ingest financial data from multiple sources, transform it for downstream analytics, and keep it reliable in production. You will work directly with product, engineering, and client-facing teams to translate complex financial data requirements into well-engineered, observable pipelines. The role demands deep technical execution, not just architectural direction. What You’ll Do Data Engineering & Pipeline Development Design, develop, and maintain end-to-end ETL/ELT pipelines that ingest financial and valuation data from relational databases, APIs, and Elasticsearch. Implement Change Data Capture (CDC) and incremental loading strategies to keep data fresh without full reloads. Build scalable ingestion frameworks for dynamic and evolving schemas, including semi-structured JSON payloads. Troubleshoot and resolve complex data integration issues in production through structured root cause analysis. Develop and maintain data transformation logic using dbt and Apache Airflow for orchestration. Cloud Data Warehousing Build and maintain dimensional models, fact tables, and reporting data marts on cloud data warehouse platforms. Optimize warehouse performance through query tuning, partitioning strategies, and storage cost management. Develop and manage data pipelines using cloud-native warehousing features for ingestion, transformation, and change tracking. Maintain transformation logic supporting analytical reporting and downstream BI consumption. API & Integration Development Build and maintain integrations from REST APIs, SaaS platforms, and internal applications into the data platform. Design reusable ingestion patterns that handle authentication, pagination, rate limiting, and schema drift. Collaborate with product and engineering teams to define integration contracts and data schemas. Work with JSON and other semi-structured formats; ensure clean parsing and lineage back to source. Data Quality & Governance Implement validation frameworks, reconciliation checks, and data quality rules across pipelines. Set up monitoring, alerting, and auditing so data issues surface before they reach end users. Ensure data accuracy, completeness, and consistency across systems and reporting layers. Participate in data governance practices: lineage tracking, documentation, and access controls. Stakeholder Collaboration Work directly with business users, valuation teams, product managers, and client stakeholders to gather requirements. Translate business and regulatory data requirements into clear, implementable technical designs. Support production deployments, incident resolution, and ongoing pipeline enhancements. Communicate clearly with both technical teammates and non-technical stakeholders on data issues and delivery timelines. Requirements : Experience 5+ years in data engineering, ETL development, or data integration — with production systems, not just prototypes. Proven track record delivering enterprise data pipelines in cloud environments. Experience with Snowflake or Databricks as a primary data platform: dimensional modeling, performance tuning, and cost management. Hands-on Informatica IICS development: mappings, tasks, REST API connectors, and error handling. Experience integrating data from REST APIs, relational databases (PostgreSQL, SQL Server, MySQL), and semi-structured sources. Practical knowledge of dbt for transformation logic and Apache Airflow for orchestration. Technical Skills ETL/ELT design: CDC patterns, incremental loads, full reloads, and SCD handling. Python or Scala for data processing, scripting, and pipeline automation. REST API consumption: authentication (OAuth, API keys), pagination, rate limiting, and schema mapping. JSON and semi-structured data parsing; experience handling evolving or inconsistent schemas. Streaming and real-time data: working knowledge of Kafka or Spark Streaming (production experience a plus). Cloud data platform experience: AWS (Glue, S3, Lambda), Azure (Data Factory, ADLS), or GCP (Dataflow, BigQuery). Data quality tooling: validation frameworks, reconciliation checks, pipeline observability, and alerting. SQL proficiency: complex joins, window functions, CTEs, and query optimization.

title: Senior Data Product Manager
description_text: OVERVIEW OF 73 STRINGS: 73 Strings is an innovative platform providing comprehensive data extraction, monitoring, and valuation solutions for the private capital industry. The company's AI-powered platform streamlines middle-office processes for alternative investments, enabling seamless data structuring and standardization, monitoring, and fair value estimation at the click of a button. 73 Strings serves clients globally across various strategies, including Private Equity, Growth Equity, Venture Capital, Infrastructure and Private Credit. Our 2025 $55M Series B, the largest in the industry, was led by Goldman Sachs, with participation from Golub Capital and Hamilton Lane, with continued support from Blackstone, Fidelity International Strategic Ventures and Broadhaven Ventures. About the Role: 73 Strings has been consistently growing and continuously innovating on its product offerings. As we step into the next phase of growth, we are investing in the foundational data platform that powers our AI-augmented products across monitoring and valuation. Today, we have real business demand for data, capable engineers spread across business units, and multiple stakeholders, but no single accountable delivery owner for the data platform itself. This role exists to change that, The Senior Data Product Manager, will be the senior individual contributor who turns the data strategy into shipped product, co-shapes the operating model on the ground, and brings the product discipline and technical credibility needed to make the strategy real. If you have built foundational data products in a low-maturity environment before, and you want to do it again with executive sponsorship and a clear strategic partner, this role is for you. Qualifications: Product management track record. 6+ years of hands-on product management experience, of which at least 3 years owning data platforms or data products end to end. General PM experience without data infrastructure depth will be discounted. Technical foundation. You started your career in a hands-on technical role (data engineering, software engineering, analytics engineering, or similar) and retain that depth. You can read a data model, challenge a pipeline design, and write SQL well enough to validate your own assumptions. Greenfield contribution. You have meaningfully contributed to building a data platform from a low-maturity starting point. Be ready to walk us through what existed when you arrived, what you personally shipped, what you co-shaped, and what survived after you left. Data-driven culture exposure. You have worked in an organisation where data genuinely powered decision-making, so you know what good looks like and have a view on how to get an organisation there. Senior individual contributor. This is an IC role, not a people-management role. You are senior because of how you think and what you ship, not because of headcount. You partner closely with the Product Director rather than driving strategy upwards. Outcome-driven. You measure yourself on adoption, business impact, and decisions changed, not on output, tickets closed, or roadmap completeness. Hands-on. You will write your own specs, draft your own data contracts, and prototype your own analyses when needed. You do not delegate thinking. Challenges the status quo. You name the things others avoid naming. You are diplomatic about it, but you do not let political comfort override the right answer. Comfortable without authority. Most of the engineering capacity you depend on does not report to you. You are practiced at influence, framing, and earning the right to lead. Industry. Adjacent industry experience is acceptable. Platform and operating-model experience matters more than domain. Prior exposure to PE/VC, valuations, or financial services is a plus, not a requirement. Communication. Exceptional written and verbal communication. You can hold credible technical conversations with senior data engineers and equally credible business conversations with non-technical stakeholders. Responsibilities: You will own delivery of the foundational data platform and core data products that the rest of 73 Strings depends on. Specifically: Translate the data platform strategy into shipped product. Co-shape the operating model, draft it, socialise it with stakeholders, and make it operational in day-to-day delivery. Ship foundational data pipelines and flagship data products to production, with named consumers, defined SLAs, and measurable adoption. Stand up product practices for the data products you own: intake, prioritisation, data contracts, lifecycle, and metrics. Manage the roadmap for foundational data products, prioritise opportunities across competing stakeholder demands, and maintain existing data products to drive business goals. Produce high-quality product requirements, in collaboration with the Product Director, SMEs, design, and engineering teams, executing using a lean, problem-first approach. Stay on top of internal consumer needs through qualitative and quantitative insights. Identify key opportunities using strong analytical thinking and transform them into action. Define and execute delivery plans across business units and ensure clear communication with internal stakeholders, particularly the engineering teams currently distributed across BUs. Provide training and end-user support (primarily to internal teams) during rollout of new data products.

title: Elektriker till 1KOMMA5° i Göteborg

Häng med på resan mot en hållbar framtid. Du är med ute på installationer av solceller, laddboxar och batterilösningar och får en varierad vardag där du lär dig både teknik, arbetssätt och branschen i stort. Rollen passar dig som vill utvecklas, ta ansvar över tid och bli riktigt vass inom området. Vi söker dig som ✔️ Utbildad elektriker med ECY (gärna första- eller andraårsmontör) ✔️ B-körkort ✔️ Talar och skriver svenska och engelska ✔️ Nyfiken, driven och vill utvecklas i din yrkesroll ✔️ Ansvarstagande och gillar att arbeta praktiskt i team Erfarenhet som elektriker och inom branschen är meriterande, men även du som är nyutbildad och vill utvecklas inom området är varmt välkommen att söka! Vad erbjuder vi dig? En trygg anställning som omfattas av kollektivavtal Stor flexibilitet med ansvar under frihet En plats i ett öppet och samarbetsorienterat team Tillgång till afterworks, happenings och goda utvecklingsmöjligheter Chansen att bidra till den gröna omställningen och göra verklig skillnad Är du redo att göra skillnad? Skicka in din ansökan idag och bli en del av vårt team! title: Senior Servicetekniker
description_text: Vi söker en affärsdriven Senior Servicetekniker till vårt team! Om rollen Som Senior Servicetekniker blir du en nyckelperson i vår serviceorganisation. Du bidrar med djup teknisk kompetens, agerar mentor för kollegor och tar ett ledande ansvar i mer komplexa serviceuppdrag. Du ansvarar för att säkerställa hög driftsäkerhet hos våra kunder genom kvalificerad service, felsökning, installationer och förebyggande underhåll av stoftavskiljare och kringutrustning. Rollen innebär ett stort eget ansvar där du planerar ditt arbete självständigt och fungerar som teknisk rådgivare gentemot både kunder och kollegor. Du kommer även att identifiera förbättringsmöjligheter, bidra till ökad serviceförsäljning och vara en viktig del i utvecklingen av våra långsiktiga kundrelationer. Du rapporterar till vår Servicechef och samarbetar nära säljorganisationen, produktion, inköp och övriga servicetekniker. Vad innebär rollen? • Teknisk service och underhåll – Utföra service, felsökning, reparationer, installationer, driftsättning och optimering. • Tekniskt ledarskap – Planera och leda serviceprojekt samt stötta kollegor. • Affärsutveckling hos kund – Identifiera förbättringsmöjligheter och merförsäljning. • Dokumentation och uppföljning – Upprätta professionella servicerapporter. • Planering och samarbete – Samverka med säljare, servicekoordinator och interna funktioner. Rollen innebär regelbundna resor till kunder främst inom Sverige, där övernattningar är förekommande. Vem är du? Du är en erfaren tekniker med stort tekniskt intresse, arbetar strukturerat och bygger förtroende hos kunder. Vi söker dig som har • Flerårig erfarenhet av industriellt service- eller underhållsarbete. • God kunskap inom mekanik samt förståelse för el- och styrsystem. • Erfarenhet av felsökning och teknisk problemlösning. • Förmåga att självständigt driva serviceuppdrag och utveckla kundrelationer. • Ett affärsmässigt förhållningssätt och fokus på kundvärde. • Vana att arbeta i digitala system och dokumentera ditt arbete. • Goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska. • B-körkort. Erfarenhet från processindustri, ventilationssystem eller stoftavskiljning är meriterande. Vi erbjuder Vi erbjuder en självständig och varierad roll där du får stor frihet att planera ditt arbete. Du blir en del av en internationell koncern med stark marknadsposition och får möjlighet att utvecklas både tekniskt och affärsmässigt. Om företaget Dinair AB är en del av AAF International och Daikin-koncernen, en global ledare inom luftfiltrering och klimatlösningar. Med över 100 års erfarenhet är Dinair/AAF en av Europas ledande tillverkare och leverantörer av ventilationsfilter samt lösningar för stoft- och rökgasfiltrering. Genom innovation, hög kvalitet och starkt kundfokus bidrar vi till renare luft och bättre arbetsmiljöer världen över. Ansökningsförfarande Uppstart: Enligt överenskommelse Placering: Kinna Omfattning: Heltid Lön: Individuell lönesättning Ansökningstid: 2026-08-31 Då det är semestertider kommer urvalsarbetet att påbörjas först i augusti. Vi välkomnar din ansökan redan nu, men återkoppling och genomgång av ansökningar sker efter semesterperioden.

Votre expertise en mixologie, votre capacité d’organisation, votre efficacité, votre sens du détail ainsi que votre créativité seront les clés de votre réussite parmi nous.

title: Commis de cuisine / petit-déjeuner (H/F)
description_text: Entreprise Venez vivre une aventure authentique en Normandie ! Le Château d'Audrieu, situé en Normandie à quelques kilomètres de Caen et des plages du Débarquement, est un monument classé du XVIIIe siècle, entouré d’un parc de 25 hectares. Cette maison 5* membre des Relais & Châteaux propose 29 chambres et suites, une cabane perchée, deux espaces de restauration signés par le Chef Samuel Gaspar, ainsi qu’un espace bien-être comprenant massage, fitness et piscine extérieure. Notre engagement : mettre l’Éveil au cœur de l’ADN de 2L Collection Avec une intention profonde et sincère, 2L Collection place l’Éveil au centre de ses Maisons. Être en pleine conscience, vivre l’instant présent, offrir de nouvelles expériences à nos clients et collaborateurs, et cultiver le lien à soi et aux autres, sont les valeurs essentielles qui nous animent. Nos Maisons s’engagent à prendre soin de vous et de la planète. Nous sommes fiers d'être l'un des 580 membres Relais & Châteaux, une association internationale d'hôtels et de restaurants indépendants. Description du poste Le Château d'Audrieu recherche un(e) commis de Cuisine Petit-Déjeuner et orienté(e) vers le client pour rejoindre notre brigade à partir du lundi 10 août 2026. En tant que Commis de Cuisine Petit-Déjeuner, vous jouerez un rôle clé dans la préparation et le bon déroulement du service du matin. Sous la supervision du Chef Exécutif, du Second(e) et des Chefs de Partie, vous serez en charge de : Mettre en place, préparer les éléments du petit-déjeuner et du dressage des assiettes ; Participer avec son équipe à la recherche de solutions visant à améliorer la productivité et les résultats ; Garantir la qualité constante des produits fabriqués dans sa partie ; Signaler à sa hiérarchie la non-conformité des produits ; Réaliser la production des préparations et recettes selon les fiches techniques ; Veiller à la qualité des mets et de la présentation avant l'envoi ; Être créatif et force de proposition pour faire évoluer la carte ; Participer à la cohésion d'équipe ; Veiller à la propreté de la cuisine et de sa partie, à l’état de l’équipement et du matériel utilisés ; Assurer une communication harmonieuse entre les équipes en enregistrant et en transmettant avec précision les informations importantes. Qualifications Expérience préalable dans l'hôtellerie ou le service à la clientèle, de préférence dans un hôtel haut de gamme ; Rigoureux et flexible, vous appréciez de travailler en équipe ; Vous avez un excellent relationnel et sens de l’accueil ; Responsable et organisé, vous avez la capacité d’anticiper les problèmes et de trouver des solutions ; Attention méticuleuse aux détails et souci d'exactitude ; Travaille les week-ends et les jours fériés. Informations supplémentaires Rejoindre le Château d’Audrieu, c’est : Faire partie de la famille 2L COLLECTION où vous retrouverez ce réel esprit de famille, ce goût immodéré pour l’Histoire, la culture, le savoir-faire, l’élégance, les plaisirs de l’esprit mais aussi de la table et des bons vins… tout ce qui constitue l’Art de vivre à la française. Intégrer un hôtel à taille humaine où les valeurs d’épanouissement, de partage, et d’humanité sont fondamentales. Bénéficier de tarifs préférentiels sur tous les établissements de la Collection. Profiter d’une prime de cooptation de 600€ pour chaque nouvelle recrue. Partager des moments uniques avec une équipe bienveillante et accueillante. Logement possible Si l’épanouissement et le partage sont essentiels pour vous, rejoignez notre équipe et participons ensemble au succès de cette nouvelle saison !

title: Senior Data Architect
description_text: OVERVIEW OF 73 STRINGS: 73 Strings is an innovative platform providing comprehensive data extraction, monitoring, and valuation solutions for the private capital industry. The company's AI-powered platform streamlines middle-office processes for alternative investments, enabling seamless data structuring and standardization, monitoring, and fair value estimation at the click of a button. 73 Strings serves clients globally across various strategies, including Private Equity, Growth Equity, Venture Capital, Infrastructure and Private Credit. Our 2025 $55M Series B, the largest in the industry, was led by Goldman Sachs, with participation from Golub Capital and Hamilton Lane, with continued support from Blackstone, Fidelity International Strategic Ventures and Broadhaven Ventures. About the Role: We are seeking a Senior Data Architect to serve as a technical lead shaping the future of our data platform in the financial services space. This is a high-impact, hands-on leadership role — you will own architectural direction, drive integration strategy, and act as a trusted technical advisor to both internal stakeholders and external clients. What You’ll Do Data Platform Leadership Define and evolve the enterprise data architecture strategy, ensuring scalability, reliability, and governance across the platform. Lead the design and implementation of cloud data warehousing and lakehouse solutions, with a focus on Snowflake and Databricks, aligned with financial services data requirements. Establish data modeling standards, data quality frameworks, and best practices across engineering teams. Champion data governance, security, and compliance practices in alignment with financial industry regulations (e.g., SOC 2, GDPR, CCPA). Integrations & API Development Partner with Product Management and business stakeholders to design and deliver robust data integrations and APIs (REST, GraphQL, ETL/ELT pipelines). Architect scalable, reusable integration patterns that connect internal systems, third-party platforms, and client data ecosystems. Define API contracts, data schemas, and integration standards that support both internal development teams and external partners. Translate complex business and regulatory requirements into sound, implementable technical designs. Implementation Support Serve as a technical expert and Engineering partner to pre-sales and implementation teams providing architectural guidance where needed to ensure successful client on boarding Engage with critical prospects and clients as needed, helping build trusted relationships with their senior technical stakeholders. Requirements : 8+ years of experience in data architecture or data engineering. Proven expertise in cloud data platforms such as Snowflake, Databricks, including data modeling, performance tuning, and cost optimization. Hands-on experience designing and building REST APIs and ETL/ELT pipelines at scale. Strong proficiency with real-time and streaming data platforms such as Kafka, Flink, and Spark. Hands-on experience with modern data orchestration and transformation tools such as dbt and Apache Airflow. Experience with data testing frameworks, pipeline observability, and monitoring practices that ensure data quality, reliability, and operational visibility in production environments. Experience with major cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP), including cloud-native data services, networking, and security. Proven experience with vector database or embedding infrastructure in production. Experience integrating unstructured data (documents, PDFs, presentations) into a structured data platform, including extraction, normalisation, and lineage back to source artefacts. Demonstrated ability to drive technical strategy and lead cross-functional projects. Working understanding of LLM and RAG architectures, including tenant-aware retrieval, context isolation, and the data quality and lineage prerequisites for safe deployment. Strong communication skills with the ability to translate complex technical concepts for executive and non-technical audiences.
